name: 30 Days Until You Become A Prince [君を王子にするまであと30日]
original_name: 30 Days Until You Become A Prince [君を王子にするまであと30日]
overview: After a failed confession, quiet college student Makoto is approached by the charismatic Yuki, a popular student who likes doing makeup. Yuki boldly declares: “I’ll turn you into a prince.”  The two team up to win a university beauty contest and prove themselves to the girl who rejected Makoto — but as their makeover journey unfolds, so do unexpected feelings.

trailers.title: New BL series trailer dropped! 【30 Days Until I Make You My Prince】| 📅Premieres on April 1, 2026 ...
